description: Patient Roberto Carlos has been referred to Dr. Cameron Cordara following elevated blood pressure readings at a community screening. Initiate a complete hypertension management protocol in GNU Health for Roberto Carlos including an active Essential Hypertension condition record (ICD-10 I10), a Lipid Panel lab test order, a prescription for Amlodipine 5 mg once daily with Dr. Cordara as the prescriber, and a follow-up appointment with Dr. Cordara scheduled within 18–42 days from today.
